disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe throbbing headache with a very high home blood-pressure reading during the attack
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to check your blood pressure?
Tell me about the headache — how did it come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My head is pounding and when my wife checked the home cuff it read 210 over 115 — that's why we're terrified.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pounding palpitations and a racing heart at rest
trigger_question_examples: Is your heart racing or pounding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is hammering so hard my chest is shaking — it won't slow down even though I'm just sitting.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse unprovoked sweating and pallor during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Has anyone said you look pale?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm absolutely drenched in sweat and my wife says I've gone really pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms occur in sudden self-resolving episodes — three milder ones over two months
trigger_question_examples: Has anything like this happened before?
Do these come in episodes or is it constant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had three of these before over the last couple of months, but milder — they each went away on their own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent unintentional weight loss and lightheadedness on standing between attacks
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight recently?
Do you feel dizzy when you stand up between these episodes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost about 5 kilos without trying, and between the attacks I go really lightheaded when I stand up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Overwhelming sense of impending doom and panic
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
Are you feeling anxious or panicky?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel like something terrible is about to happen — like I'm going to die. It's terrifying.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No decongestant or stimulant drug use; on no regular medications
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any cold-and-flu tablets, decongestants or other stimulants?
Are you on any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't taken any cold tablets or anything like that, and I'm not on any regular medicines.
